creator: jim@thehouselys.net
text:
This the a collection of 42 ports plus 7 base directories
	to enable embedded development with the RTEMS RTOS.  This
	provides C/C++, CHILL, F77, JAVA, OBJC, binutils & gdb
	for i386, i960, m68k, mips64orion, powerpc, sh and sparc
	processors.

	RTEMS is an open-source RTOS for embedded system development.
	It now provides TCP/IP using the FreeBSD stack.  See
	http://www.oarcorp.com/ for more information on RTEMS.
